title: Self-install completions + uninstall + crates.io docs
description: Add 'bl completions install' subcommand that writes bash/zsh/fish completions to ~/.local/share standard locations. Add 'make uninstall'. Update Makefile install target to call the new subcommand. Update README to document crates.io install path with completions install step, and document uninstall.

notes.author: mark
notes.text: Add bl completions --install/--uninstall, refactor Makefile, document crates.io path

notes.author: mark
